chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1931 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 13.11.2025 Mr. Irfan Ali advocate a/w petitioners Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri Assistant A.G Sindh a/w Investigation Officer *** Mr. Manzor Ali Mashori advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.4/complainant, which is taken on record. Investigation Officer has recorded the statement of petitioner No.1, wherein she has categorically denied the allegations levelled in the FIR bearing Crime No.133 of 2025 registered at P.S Pangrio District Badin and states that she being sui juris has contracted marriage of free-will with petitioner No.2. Investigation Officer submits that based on the statement of lady petitioner he will file his final report before the learned Magistrate concerned for disposal of the case under C-class. In view of the above, instant petition is disposed of with directions to Investigation Officer to file his report keeping in view the statement of lady petitioner before learned Magistrate within seven days for disposal of the case in accordance with law. Meanwhile petitioners shall not be arrested in above FIR and they may be provided protection. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
